title: gentianella tubulosa
intro: Gentianella tubulosa, also known as the alpine gentianella or tubulose gentianella, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the gentian family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gentianella tubulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Gentianella tubulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and endangered status.
